services.name: Banquet Captain
services.shortDescription: Elevate your events with dependable banquet staff—deployed quickly, trained professionally, and ready to perform.
services.fullDescription: Our Banquet Captains are seasoned professionals who lead service teams with precision and expertise. They manage event flow, coordinate staff, ensure guest satisfaction, and maintain the highest standards of hospitality.
keyResponsibilities: Lead and supervise banquet service teams
Coordinate with kitchen and event planning staff
Manage guest experience and handle special requests
Train and mentor service staff during events
Ensure adherence to service standards and timing
Monitor event setup, service flow, and breakdown
requiredSkills: Knowledge of service protocols and etiquette

services.name: Banquet Servers
services.shortDescription: Professional Banquet Servers you can count on. Skilled in handling events with care and precision. Flexible support whenever you need it.
services.fullDescription: Our Banquet Servers are trained professionals who deliver exceptional service during all types of events. From cocktail receptions to formal dinners, they ensure seamless service with attention to detail and guest satisfaction.
keyResponsibilities: Deliver food and beverages to guests with professionalism
Set tables according to service standards
Clear and reset tables between courses
Address guest requests and special needs
Maintain proper etiquette and presentation
Support event coordinators and banquet captains
requiredSkills: Knowledge of proper table service techniques
Ability to work efficiently in fast-paced environments
Physical stamina and attention to detail

services.name: Housekeeping
services.shortDescription: Skilled Housekeeping staff delivering high standards of cleanliness. From daily upkeep to deep cleaning. Flexible support for any requirement.
services.fullDescription: Our Housekeeping professionals maintain pristine environments in luxury hospitality settings. Whether for daily operations or specialized cleaning projects, they ensure properties meet the highest cleanliness standards.
keyResponsibilities: Clean and maintain guest rooms and common areas
Perform daily cleaning routines and deep cleaning projects
Change linens and restock supplies
Inspect rooms for cleanliness and maintenance issues
Handle guest requests and rush room readiness
Maintain inventory of cleaning supplies and equipment
requiredSkills: Knowledge of cleaning procedures and products
Physical ability to perform cleaning tasks
Attention to detail and quality standards

services.name: Stewards
services.shortDescription: Experienced Stewards keeping food service areas clean and efficient. From dishwashing to kitchen support. Consistent, dependable, and ready to assist.
services.fullDescription: Our Stewards are essential to any hospitality kitchen operation. They ensure kitchen cleanliness, handle dishwashing, assist with food preparation, and support the back-of-house operations that keep service running smoothly.
keyResponsibilities: Operate commercial dishwashing equipment
Maintain kitchen cleanliness and sanitation standards
Handle pots, pans, utensils, and glassware
Assist with food preparation and storage
Remove trash and maintain proper waste disposal
Support kitchen staff during service
requiredSkills: 1+ years food service or kitchen experience
Knowledge of food safety and sanitation
Physical stamina for standing and repetitive tasks
Ability to work in fast-paced kitchens

services.name: Bartenders
services.shortDescription: More than just drinks—smooth service and great timing behind every counter. Our bartenders handle the rush while keeping guests happy. Ideal for events, bars, and private setups.
services.fullDescription: Our Bartenders are skilled professionals who craft quality beverages while delivering exceptional guest service. They manage high-volume service, handle cash operations, and create memorable experiences at bars, events, and private functions.
keyResponsibilities: Mix and serve cocktails, beer, and wine to professional standards
Manage bar operations and cleanliness
Take orders and manage guest interactions
Handle cash and payment processing
Maintain inventory and monitor stock levels
Follow proper pouring and portion control standards
requiredSkills: Liquor license certification (or willingness to obtain)
Strong customer service and communication skills
Cash handling and basic math abilities
Ability to multitask in high-volume settings

services.name: Security Services
services.shortDescription: Security that stays alert so your space stays calm. From entry points to full-site coverage, everything is under watch. Reliable presence for events, venues, and properties.
services.fullDescription: Our Security Services provide professional, trained personnel to protect your guests, staff, and assets. From discreet event security to comprehensive property protection, our team ensures safety with a professional presence.
keyResponsibilities: Monitor entry and exit points
Conduct security patrols and inspections
Respond to security incidents and emergencies
Check credentials and manage access control
Observe and report suspicious activity
Assist guests and provide directions as needed
requiredSkills: Ability to remain calm under pressure

services.name: Banquet Housemen
services.shortDescription: Turning empty spaces into ready-to-go event setups. From early setup to final breakdown, every detail is covered. Reliable support that keeps everything moving smoothly.
services.fullDescription: Our Banquet Housemen are the backbone of event logistics. They handle the physical setup and breakdown of event spaces, move equipment, arrange furniture, and ensure venues are ready for flawless service.
keyResponsibilities: Set up tables, chairs, and event equipment
Arrange and configure event spaces per specifications
Move and store furniture and equipment
Handle decorations and stage setup
Perform breakdown and cleanup after events
Maintain cleanliness of event spaces throughout service
requiredSkills: 1+ years event setup or hospitality experience
Physical strength and ability to lift heavy items
Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions

services.name: Resto Food Runner
services.shortDescription: Fast hands, clear focus, and perfect timing. Making sure every plate reaches the right table without confusion. Keeping the service running at its best.
services.fullDescription: Our Food Runners are the critical link between kitchen and dining room. They ensure dishes reach tables promptly and accurately, maintain table cleanliness, and support the entire service flow during busy service periods.
keyResponsibilities: Deliver food orders from kitchen to tables accurately
Clear plates and reset tables between courses
Communicate between kitchen and service staff
Assist with table maintenance and cleanliness
Manage tray handling and proper plate placement
Respond quickly to guest and server requests
requiredSkills: 1+ years food service or restaurant experience
Knowledge of proper food handling and service
Ability to work in high-energy environments
Physical ability to carry multiple plates
benefits: Career path to server or leadership roles
